_comment_ui_send_mail: If true, the web dashboard (--serve) ALSO sends the e-mail alert on top of showing it in the UI. Default false = UI only.
_comment_scope: Search is limited to online offers + physical stores within radius_km of the location below. Stores outside the radius are filtered out automatically.

email.subject: ✅ Midea PortaSplit ist wieder verfügbar!
email._comment_credentials: SMTP user/password come from the env vars MIDEA_SMTP_USER and MIDEA_SMTP_PASS. For GMX you must enable POP3/IMAP access in the GMX settings first.
